questions.question: I am used to {a1} at night.
She is getting used to {a1} early.
We used to {a1} near the sea.
He is used to {a1} alone now.
You will get used to {a1} here.
I am not used to {a1} so much noise.
Are you used to {a1} from home?
As children, we used to {a1} outside all day.
Do not write “am used to work”; write “am used to {a1}.”
He did not use to {a1} coffee.
Did she use to {a1} here?
They got used to {a1} in a small flat.
